这一本虽然才更新30章也先给个5醒好评吧，惜惜很可爱，我家也有一个这样的小可爱。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708601734,"group_id":"7337325497539365950","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"20年资深书虫","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N54XtB1cL6C5SoukRlgRpIiy1JUbdmbziidvMEkH89Xn","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0ee4f79496cd484db2a3db1291415df0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787500&x-signature=TsZ4hWYAFpxHwYLPi%2Bh%2B4hfJmIY%3D","user_id":"2630496430858637","user_name":"VG阿米基德"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2630496430858637","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7337325497539365950","book_info":{"abstract":"又名：爸爸唱歌不是工作吗？怎么我成国民女儿了？
【都市日常生活文+奶爸萌娃+单女主+娱乐圈】
主打温馨治愈、节奏慢热、非快节奏脑洞爽文；
萌娃与奶爸、与妈妈的互动绝对有趣，男主与女主的互动也会很甜。
作者两本9分以上的作品，质量有保障可以放心观看。
要问最惬意的生活是什么？苏晓肯定会回答说：有个一起长大的青梅当老婆，生个活泼可爱、古灵精怪的小棉袄。
哦，对了，如果还能实现我的歌手梦那就更好了！
因此苏晓成了歌手里，最会带娃的奶爸，奶爸里，最会唱歌的歌手。
十多年后，成为“情歌教父”、"鬼才创作人"、"经典制造机"的苏晓面对记者的提问。
记者：所以你的职业到底是什么？
苏晓：我呀，其实就是个平平无奇的大学老师罢了。
记者：那惜惜的《儿歌系列》又是怎么回事？
苏晓：小时候随便教她唱的。
记者：那《睡前小故事》呢？也是随便讲给她听的？
苏晓点了点头，表示的确是这样的。
记者：(╯‵□′)╯︵┻━┻","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3abb0d41043c63121de69419f6836ad1","author":"拾貮","author_id":"","book_id":"7337325497539365950","book_name":"娱乐奶爸：完了，我被女儿曝光了","book_short_name":"星光与萌娃","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8b0b8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7757人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7337325828625138238","read_count":"7757","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"603934"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"287","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,奶爸,娱乐圈,直播,单女主,开局,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8de8fecbcddaa3eec5391bc6c678cded~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779398239&x-signature=jYHB7o%2F0IGYhxvDV2b8x1Zwvgxc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"88461365735","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"58"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323051719E0FCC09BCEA5045A998C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5755,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":24800},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1708602589,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7343249616288940862","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"炒鸡推荐的慢节奏日常文，搭配着文娱，作者文笔质量双认证，上一本书也是一下吸引住了我。是番茄平台里绝对值得一看的慢节奏文。在各种系统和爽文夹杂的环境里，还有这样的小说。实属不易。看过之后不禁会让人向往这样的生活。芊芊和苏晓的糖也甜的齁，惜惜也调皮可爱作为书里的气氛组，带来很多笑点，看完会忍不住扬起嘴角。作为不那么侧重娱乐圈属性的读者，这是一本绝对值得一看的好书！
作者还在评论区和读者群里高强度和书友互动[重拳出击]。大家快来砍他！！！[怒]
